title: Internet Blackout Keeps Iranians From Reaching Loved Ones During Nowruz Holiday
summary_full: The current restrictions on the internet in Iran are coinciding with Nowruz, the observance of the Persian New Year.
summary_public: The current restrictions on the internet in Iran are coinciding with Nowruz, the observance of the Persian New Year.
